name: HUNTER Market Workflow v2.0 — METATRON v10.7

parameters.content:
## 🔱 METATRON v10.7 — MARKET WATCH WORKFLOW

**RULES:**
- alwaysOutputData = FALSE on ALL HTTP nodes
- H37/H38/H39 MUST complete BEFORE Master Merge
- Correlation Gate Check BEFORE any analysis
- Kill Switch = NO OVERRIDE
- 30 gates total (9 Cascade + 21 METATRON)

**IRONCLAD v2.0:**
- Same-day re-entry BANNED
- Kill Switch = auto 50% metals reduction
- 48-hour embargo after kill

## API Keys
- SEC EDGAR: User-Agent header only
- Finnhub: query param `token`
- TwelveData: query param `apikey`
- Alpha Vantage: query param `apikey`
- NewsAPI: query param `apiKey`
- Congress.gov: query param `api_key`
- FRED: query param `api_key`
- metals.dev: query param `api_key`
- FEC: query param `api_key`
- Yahoo/Senate LDA/USASpending: No key

parameters.content:
## H37/H38/H39 — CORRELATION MODULES

Added March 3, 2026
Root cause fix: $9K metals loss

**KILL SWITCH fires when:**
- DXY above SMA20 AND rising
- AND 10Y yield above 4.5% AND rising
- OR 2/3 ETFs show institutional exit

**NO OVERRIDE. NO EXCEPTIONS.**
